Our Mission & Philosophy

सहस्रशीर्षा पुरुषः सहस्राक्षः सहस्रपात्‌।
स भूमिं विश्वतो वृत्वाऽत्यतिष्ठद्दशाङ्गुलम्‌॥

पुरुष एवेदं सर्वं यद्भूतं यच्च भव्यम्‌।
उतामृतत्वस्येशानो यदन्नेनातिरोहति॥

— Purusha Sūkta, Rigveda 10.90
✦

"That Infinite Being has a thousand heads, a thousand eyes and a thousand feet enveloping the whole universe on all sides. He exists beyond ten fingers. — that which is, that which was, and that which is yet to be, is nothing but this Infinite Being. He remains the lord of immortality."

Vastu Shastra is the ancient science of aligning physical space with this infinite cosmic order — ensuring that every room, every direction, every threshold resonates with the natural flow of energy that pervades all existence.

Vedic Astrology charts the same cosmic intelligence as it moves through time — revealing the patterns that shape health, relationships, and prosperity in our lives.

At BhummiVastu, we bridge these two timeless sciences to help seekers across India live in conscious harmony with the universe around them.

About the Consultant

Meet Vastu Acharya Minu Saini —
India's Trusted Vastu & Astrology Consultant

BhummiVastu is a trusted Vastu and Vedic Astrology consultancy serving individuals, families, and businesses across India — online from anywhere in the country, and in-person for clients in Bangalore and Karnataka. Founded by Vastu Acharya Minu Saini, the practice has guided 100+ clients with practical, personalised solutions rooted in ancient wisdom and adapted for modern living.

With over 5 years of dedicated practice, Minu's expertise spans residential Vastu for homes and flats, commercial Vastu for offices and startups, and Vedic Astrology for career decisions, relationships, and life planning. Her knowledge has been shaped through continuous learning and deep engagement with traditional Vedic and spiritual disciplines — enriching her understanding of spatial energy, cosmic timing, and the subtle forces that govern well-being.

Her approach is refreshingly non-invasive and non-demolition first — achieving results through the intelligent placement of objects, colours, directions, and energetic remedies, not construction. Whether you are seeking a Vastu consultation for your home — anywhere in India — guidance on a business decision, or a Jyotish reading for a major life transition, Minu brings the same quality of attention, care, and respect for tradition to every engagement.

BhummiVastu brings together the wisdom of Vastu Shastra and Vedic Astrology to help you move forward with confidence, balance, and purpose — wherever you are in life.

Book a Consultation Learn More About Minu
  • Certified Vastu Acharya with 5+ years of active practice
  • Continuous advanced training in traditional Vedic and spiritual disciplines
  • Non-demolition first approach — practical, modern, non-disruptive
  • 100+ satisfied clients across India — homes, offices & businesses
  • Online consultations across India · In-Person in Bangalore & Karnataka

Our Foundations

What We Stand For

Five principles that guide every consultation — and every result we help you achieve.

Scientific Logic

Vastu is a science of energy and spatial geometry, not a set of religious rules. We explain the "how" and "why" behind every suggestion so you feel confident — not confused — about the results.

Zero-Demolition Practicality

We respect your existing space. Our remedies focus on non-disruptive corrections — using colours, elements, and precise placements — to achieve harmony without any demolition or reconstruction.

Ethical Integrity

Our guidance is grounded in honesty. We never use fear or exaggerated claims to drive decisions. We provide only what is necessary for your well-being and growth, with complete transparency throughout.

Client-Centric Empathy

Every individual's journey is unique. We listen deeply to your specific concerns — career, health, or relationships — and tailor our Astro-Vastu solutions to support your personal goals and lifestyle.

Empowerment Through Knowledge

We don't just fix spaces; we empower people. We educate our clients on how to maintain a high-vibrational environment, making harmony a permanent part of their lives long after the consultation ends.

The Process

Your Journey to Harmony — 5 Simple Steps

A structured, transparent process designed to deliver real, measurable results — for your home, office, or life.

Step 1: Discovery & Data Sharing

Share your current life challenges along with your property floor plan and birth details. This foundational data allows us to map your unique energy blueprint — ensuring every recommendation is grounded in your specific reality, not a generic template.

Step 2: Technical Survey & Directional Mapping

We perform precise directional mapping using Google Earth for online sessions — available for clients across India — or an on-site visit for those in Bangalore and Karnataka, to identify hidden Vastu Doshas affecting health, relationships, and finances.

Step 3: 16-Zone Zonal Analysis

Vastu Acharya Minu Saini conducts a deep-dive analysis of your space across 16 directions and 45 energy fields, cross-referencing them with your astrological planetary periods (Dashas) for a truly integrated Astro-Vastu diagnosis.

Step 4: Live Consultation & Written Report

Receive a detailed written report followed by a dedicated video call or in-person meeting. Every zero-demolition remedy is explained with its scientific and directional reasoning — so you understand the "why," not just the "what."

Step 5: Implementation & Follow-Up Support

Harmony is a journey, not a one-time event. We offer complimentary follow-up support to confirm remedies are correctly implemented and to track measurable shifts in energy, well-being, and results over time.
